summary: Comprehensive backend and frontend testing of new StoryCraft AI features: video generation without image, story suggestion card pre-fill, SceneGridEditor loading states, parent email settings, and notification bell. Fixed critical imageio frame-size bug and updated outdated backend tests.

critical.issue: Frame size mismatch: existing image resized to (640, 360) but Nano Banana frames resized to (640, 368), causing imageio 'All images in a movie should have same size' error on every video generation when scene had an existing image.

ui_bugs.issue: Title pre-fill appends 'Adventure' even when theme already contains the word - e.g., theme='Ocean Adventure' → title='Ocean Adventure Adventure'. Code: `title: suggestion?.theme ? \`${suggestion.theme} Adventure\` : ''`

action_items: Fix story title pre-fill: in StorySetupPage.js, change `title: suggestion?.theme ? \`${suggestion.theme} Adventure\` : ''` to just `title: suggestion?.theme || ''` or handle the case where theme already ends with 'Adventure'.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: generate_nano_banana_video in server.py had inconsistent frame sizes (640x360 for existing_img vs 640x368 for new frames). Fixed by adding TARGET_SIZE = (640, 368) constant used for all frames.

MINOR: Story suggestion title pre-fill has a logic issue - if theme is 'Ocean Adventure', title becomes 'Ocean Adventure Adventure' (duplicate word). Should check if 'Adventure' is already in theme or just use theme as-is.
ADDED: data-testid='notification-bell' to Navbar.js bell button (was missing testid).
ADDED: data-testid='generate-all-videos-btn' to SceneGridEditor.js generate all button (was missing testid).
BACKEND: generate-video endpoint (POST /scenes/{scene_id}/generate-video) correctly works without requiring a pre-existing image - confirmed behavior change from old version.

BACKEND: batch-generate-videos still requires scenes with images (returns 400 if none) - this is intentional per current code but inconsistent with single scene video generation which no longer requires an image.
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py (line 2355-2376: fixed frame size bug, added TARGET_SIZE constant)
/app/backend/tests/test_scene_and_notifications.py (updated story_and_scene fixture to wait for generation, updated video tests to reflect new no-image-required behavior)
seed_data_creation: Created video_test_1771703962@test.com with story 'Test Video Story' (3 scenes, 3 images, 2 videos generated)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Key changes tested: 1) generate-video now works WITHOUT an image (no 400 error for missing image). 2) Suggestion cards pre-fill story form (title/tone/moral/topic) - works but has duplicate word bug in title. 3) SceneGridEditor has generate-image/generate-video with loading spinners. 4) Generate All Videos button works. 5) CRITICAL BUG FIXED: imageio frame size inconsistency in generate_nano_banana_video (was 640x360 vs 640x368, now unified to 640x368). 6) batch-generate-videos still requires images (400 if none). Test user: video_test_1771703962@test.com / TestPass123!. Story: 07e708eb. Backend tests: 18/18 passing.

rca_of_the_issue.bug: imageio 'All images in a movie should have same size' error
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: In generate_nano_banana_video(), existing scene image was resized to (640, 360) but newly generated Nano Banana frames were resized to (640, 368). imageio requires all frames to have identical dimensions for MP4 encoding.
rca_of_the_issue.reproduction: Trigger generate-video on a scene that already has an image_url. The existing image becomes frame 1 at 640x360, while subsequent Nano Banana frames are 640x368, causing the size mismatch error.
rca_of_the_issue.fix: Added TARGET_SIZE = (640, 368) constant (divisible by macro_block_size=16) and applied it consistently to both existing image resize and new frame resize in generate_nano_banana_video().
rca_of_the_issue.verification: Job 9eecdfa9 for scene d6d31bd3 completed successfully after fix (visible in backend logs at 20:13:56)
